chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S-222 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of main case. 12-12-2022 Appellant present in person. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon A.P.G. Sindh. MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J: - Appellant in person has challenged impugned judgment dated 11.10.2022 in Criminal Case No.44 of 2022 arising out of crime No.45/2022, under section 430, 34 PPC registered at PS Tando Bago, rendered by Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Golarchi @ Badin, whereby respondents were acquitted of the charge. 2. I have heard complainant in person and learned A.P.G. Sindh and perused the impugned judgment, which contains sufficient reasons to disbelieve evidence of the complainant. Besides, there are contradictions highlighted by learned trial Court. No case for indulgence under section 417 (2A) Cr.P.C. has been made out. Accordingly, this criminal acquittal appeal is dismissed. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
